name: osint_web
summary: Extensive open-source research returned no publicly indexed social media profiles, professional listings, or other web presence directly attributable to a 'Mateo Amado Ares' residing in Oleiros, A Coruña, Spain. The only publicly documented individual sharing the 'Amado Ares' double surname in the A Coruña metropolitan area is 'Jose Antonio Amado Ares', listed as Director de Compras at steelmaker Megasa and based in A Coruña — a possible family relation. No confirmed employer, role, or lifestyle signals were found for the subject.

facts.claim: A person named 'Jose Antonio Amado Ares' is publicly listed as Director de Compras at Megasa (steel company) and based in A Coruña, Spain — possibly a family member of the subject.
Jose Antonio Amado Ares studied at Universidad de Santiago de Compostela (Licenciatura en Empresariales, 1983-1989) per public business-contact aggregator data.

signals.notes: Address supplied by requester; not independently confirmed via any public record. The 'Amado Ares' surname combination is documented in A Coruña area via a likely family member.
